creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: delphij
Date: Tue Mar 18 20:05:55 2014
New Revision: 263316
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/263316

Log:
  MFC r249562:
  
  Fix incomplete printf.
  
  PR:		kern/177889
  Submitted by:	Sven-Thorsten Dietrich <sven vyatta com>

Modified:
  stable/8/sys/netinet/ip_mroute.c
Directory Properties:
  stable/8/sys/   (props changed)
  stable/8/sys/netinet/   (props changed)

Changes in other areas also in this revision:
Modified:
  stable/9/sys/netinet/ip_mroute.c
Directory Properties:
  stable/9/sys/   (props changed)

Modified: stable/8/sys/netinet/ip_mroute.c
==============================================================================
--- stable/8/sys/netinet/ip_mroute.c	Tue Mar 18 20:01:46 2014	(r263315)
+++ stable/8/sys/netinet/ip_mroute.c	Tue Mar 18 20:05:55 2014	(r263316)
@@ -2842,7 +2842,8 @@ ip_mroute_modevent(module_t mod, int typ
 	if_detach_event_tag = EVENTHANDLER_REGISTER(ifnet_departure_event, 
 	    if_detached_event, NULL, EVENTHANDLER_PRI_ANY);
 	if (if_detach_event_tag == NULL) {
-		printf("ip_mroute: unable to ifnet_deperture_even handler\n");
+		printf("ip_mroute: unable to register "
+		    "ifnet_departure_event handler\n");
 		MROUTER_LOCK_DESTROY();
 		return (EINVAL);
 	}
